reviews.comment:

There are long delays when refueling, and when you pay by card the delay is much longer.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Te hacen esperar 1 hora para venderte infinia  diesel  y cuando vas a cargar te dicen que no hay y no va a haber  hasta el día siguiente.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. They make you wait an hour to sell you Infinia Diesel, and when you go to fill up they tell you there isn't any and there won't be any until the next day.

reviews.comment:
SON UNOS DELICUENTES DEBERÍA CONTROLARLOS UN PAR DE SANDWICHES CON UNA MÍNIMA FETA DE QUESO Y JAMÓN PAN DE MENOS DE 10 CM $180 ES UN ROBO!!!!
